sections.title: Project Overview
sections.content: This agreement covers the development of 3 custom AI agents for customer-1755455121176.

sections.title: Services
sections.content:
- Content Automation Agent: Automates content creation and publishing
- Customer Communication Agent: Handles customer inquiries and follow-ups
- Data Processing Agent: Automates data entry and processing

sections.title: Timeline
sections.content: Project will be completed within Within a month.

sections.title: Terms and Conditions
sections.content:
Development timeline: 2-4 weeks
Payment: 50% upfront, 50% upon completion
Support: 30 days included
Warranty: 90 days on all deliverables
Changes: Minor changes included, major changes may incur additional costs
